name: Sicilian Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the breadmaker in the order listed.
2. Allow the breadmaker to knead and let rise slightly before removing, approximately 20 to 25 minutes.
3. Remove the dough before the bake cycle starts.
Note: I use the DAK Autobakery on the white bread setting to make this dough. After removal, place the dough on a lightly floured cutting board and cover with a clean moist towel to rise for an additional 30 minutes or so before forming it onto the pizza tray.
